𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗨𝗧 | A cross-platform, open-source video editing application.  🌟 Rising Fast!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A cross-platform, open-source video editing application.
📅 Created: Jun 2025 • Updated: May 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Editor API
✅ Third-party plugins
✅ Cross-platform (web, desktop, mobile) with Rust core
✅ MCP server for AI agents
✅ Headless mode for automation
✅ Scripting tab in editor


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

🍴 5.6K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 205 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OpenCut is a free and open-source video editor being rewritten from the ground up to support web, desktop, and mobile platforms with a Rust core. It aims to offer a plugin-first architecture, an editor API, and headless capabilities for automation and batch rendering.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/OpenCut-app/OpenCut

𝗖𝗟𝗜-𝗔𝗡𝗬𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗡𝗚 | To enable AI agents to interact with and control any software through a unified command-line interface system.  🔥 Super Hot!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: May 2026

✅ Agent-native software integration
✅ CLI-Hub for browsing, installing, and managing community-built CLIs
✅ Support for various AI agents (Pi, OpenClaw, nanobot, Cursor, Claude Code, etc.)
✅ Extensible through community contributions
✅ Unified skill management with `skills/` directory and `npx skills add` command

CLI-Anything is a Python-based framework designed to make all software accessible to AI agents. It provides a unified hub for installing and managing command-line interfaces (CLIs), enabling AI agents to interact with and control various applications and services seamlessly.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✅ Speech recognition for websites
✅ Voice command control
✅ No dependencies
✅ Lightweight (2 KB)
✅ MIT License

annyang is a lightweight JavaScript library that enables speech recognition on websites, allowing users to control web applications and interact with content using voice commands. It requires no external dependencies and is easy to integrate.

𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗘𝗦-𝗨𝗡𝗪𝗥𝗔𝗣𝗣𝗜𝗡𝗚 | Defining and refining the specification for JavaScript Promises to standardize asynchronous programming.  🔥 Super Hot!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Defining and refining the specification for JavaScript Promises to standardize asynchronous programming.
📅 Created: Aug 2013 • Updated: May 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Definition of Promise states: fulfilled, rejected, pending
✅ Explanation of Promise resolution and settlement
✅ Abstract operations for Promise management (PromiseCapability, PromiseReaction)
✅ Detailed algorithm steps for Promise handling (IfAbruptRejectPromise)


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 92 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 9 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository contains the specification for ES6 Promises, defining their states (fulfilled, rejected, pending) and behavior. It serves as a staging ground for refining the promises specification and fixing related issues, aiming to provide a robust foundation for asynchronous operations in JavaScript.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/domenic/promises-unwrapping

𝗘𝗜𝗗𝗢𝗦 | To provide a local-first, extensible, and AI-enhanced personal data management system that functions like a pocket database.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a local-first, extensible, and AI-enhanced personal data management system that functions like a pocket database.
📅 Created: Jun 2023 • Updated: May 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Personal Data Management with Notion-like documents and databases
✅ Offline Support with local data storage
✅ AI Features for translation, summarization, and data interaction
✅ Extensible framework with a simple extension system
✅ Open SQLite data format


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 135 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 17 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Eidos is an extensible framework for personal data management, transforming SQLite into a user-friendly pocket database. It offers Notion-like document and database capabilities with strong offline support and integrated AI features for data interaction and extension generation.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈
